title: Hex Spell Wheel
description: An addon for Hex Casting (1.20.1) that allows you to open a wheel menu to select a spell book page!
body: An addon for [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) 1.20.1 that adds a wheel for Hex Casting's [spellbook item](https://hexcasting.hexxy.media/v/0.11.2/1.0/en_us/#items/spellbook). ## Features: - Open a spellbook wheel by pressing the backtick key (configurable in the keybinds menu). - Quickly navigate through your spells by using number keys (1-9). - Set icons for spellbook pages (right-clicking on a spell wheel button while holding an item will change it). (Since `1.1.0`) - Cast with an artifact/trinket in hand right after changing the page by holding `Ctrl` and pressing on the spell wheel (quick navigation via number keys activate it too). (Since `1.1.0`) - Preview the iota stored in the spellbook page by hovering over the page's button in the wheel menu. (Since `1.1.0`) - Fully client-side! ## Requirements: - [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) (guh) - [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) ## Special Thanks To: - [Ouro](https://modrinth.com/user/ouroborosgames) for the logo. - [Manchick](https://modrinth.com/user/Manchick) for the original wheel code (licensed under MIT).
